description_cn:
拐角分割。

根据设定的角度将多段线分割。非闭合的多段线，会自动闭合后进行计算拆分。
description_en:
Corner division.

The polyline is divided according to the set angle. Non-closed polylines will be automatically closed before calculation and splitting.

parameters.name: A
parameters.desc_cn: 以弧度为单位的分割角度
parameters.desc_en: Angle in radians to split at

outputs.name: C
outputs.desc_en: Points at which the angle exceeded the threshold

author: Kangaroo Team
